title: Secret Creeping Moth: team-member closeout — 3 boundaries discharged (consolidation + V3 reviewer-dispatch + cross-current resolution); claim 36940f82 closed; staged tree forward to Seaworthy marshal queue
body:
Team-member closeout — Secret Creeping Moth / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 61d726.

Per owner direction at ~13:13Z: "close all claims and prepare for handoff and compaction".

## Boundaries owned this re-engagement window (post-compaction restart at 12:42Z)

Three discrete boundaries discharged cleanly, all under Director routing (Abyssal → Incandescent lineage):

1. **Failure-mode consolidation extension (Abyssal routing 14b56fc7 at 12:44:35Z)**: extended my prior §6.7–§6.10 consolidation pass with second-mega-commit emergency-unblock as new worked instance + HUSKY=0 substrate gap capture + 2 behaviour-notes from Abyssal tick #6 surface. Bundle: 4 new napkin entries + 1 P6 pending-graduations refinement (second-worked-instance grounding + adjacent-substrate-gap flag). Substantively approved by Incandescent at tick #1 V2 (12:59:50Z). Staged in working tree; queued with Seaworthy via marshal request `6eb7888f` at 12:55:40Z.

2. **Reviewer-dispatch absorber for Twilit cure bundle (Incandescent V3 re-route from Abyssal at 12:59:50Z; fired at 13:01:42Z bundle-ready)**: fired 3 claude-side sub-agents in parallel via Agent tool — architecture-expert-fred (PASS-WITH-AMENDMENTS) + test-expert (IMPROVEMENTS-RECOMMENDED, atomic-landing flagged-for-record) + code-expert (APPROVED-WITH-SUGGESTIONS). Absorbed all 3 verdicts; surfaced synthesised verdict to Incandescent at 13:09:22Z as **GO-WITH-CONDITION** (3 in-bundle fixes + 4 deferrable + atomic-landing flag-for-record). Incandescent absorbed in full and routed conditions to Twilit at 13:11:23Z.

3. **Owner-direction-conflict cross-current resolution (12:42Z owner direction "make yourself available to Twilit" vs 12:44:35Z Abyssal routing to consolidation)**: resolved via 81-second conditional-default discharge — directed offer to Twilit with 2 uncovered slices + 5-min fallback to Abyssal routing. Twilit declined at 12:48:39Z; default fired. Friction also surfaced to Director (Incandescent ack absorbed). Worked instance captured in my own napkin extension under this boundary.

## Evidence

- Directed events (authored): `32463432` (Twilit offer), `ca6623d6` (Abyssal ACK + friction surface), `6eb7888f` (marshal request to Seaworthy), `a8c9b741` (correction to Seaworthy on out-of-scope anti-pattern), `2be18599` (friction surface + V1+V2+V3 ACK to Incandescent), `a8f8fada` (synthesised verdict to Incandescent)
- Broadcasts (authored): `0a50a3ee` (team-start)
- Closed claims: `36940f82-48b2-4873-b33e-c3982740e652` (just closed via `claims close`)
- Reviewer agent IDs (resumable if needed): Fred `a24d1d76b682ac125`, test-expert `aa1488f22aaadb323`, code-expert `afa8df93d72bc6f8b`

## Claims / queue / git state at closeout

- **Active claims under (Secret Creeping Moth / 61d726)**: NONE (closed via `claims close` just now).
- **Staged tree**: `napkin.md` + `pending-graduations.md` staged (+81 lines net, fingerprint pending). Preserved in working tree as forward-marshal-pickup vehicle.
- **Marshal request `6eb7888f`** with Seaworthy: queued behind tree-green-restoration. Twilit's cure (with V3 conditions absorbed) is ahead; Sonar tail (5.9% duplication-density + 20 new_violations) is the long tail. Order of landing per Seaworthy: Twilit cure → Sonar fix bundles batched (Pearly + Zephyrous + Seaworthy own + S6564 dispositions via Gnarled) → Secret consolidation → Seaworthy doc edit.
- **Monitor `b42zm4r3n`**: will stop next.

## Retained claims / handoff reason

NONE retained. The staged tree (napkin.md + pending-graduations.md, +81 lines) is the forward-marshal-pickup; Seaworthy holds marshal authority via marshal request `6eb7888f`. No follow-on agent needs to pick up my boundary — Seaworthy will sweep the staged content through the next clean marshal cycle when red gates clear.

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

None at the agent level. Seaworthy (commit marshal) already has marshal authority on my bundle via `6eb7888f` — they will land it autonomously when gates clear. If a post-compaction Secret Creeping Moth re-opens during the wait, they inherit a clean no-claim posture; the marshal queue absorbs the landing.

## Surprise / changed understanding

- **3 worked-instances of the "pre-existing, out-of-scope" anti-pattern in 12 minutes** (Seaworthy 12:54Z + me 12:55Z + others), all caught + corrected via the standing rule rather than rationalised. Incandescent named this as tick #1 substrate-capture: "recursion-of-doctrine pattern (third worked instance in 12 min today; cycle 1 of my Director window's process-overhead)". The recursion itself motivated the owner-directed ADR-185 auto-acceptance metadata cure (Zephyrous now drafting).
- **My own contribution to that recursion** was the 12:55:40Z marshal request body ("out of my scope; you already flagged for separate fix-tranche") — 30 seconds after Seaworthy's correction landed, before I read it. Self-corrected at 12:56:17Z via `a8c9b741`. Seaworthy's 30-second-mirror framing landed at 12:56:42Z; we both reached the corrected posture independently rather than via cross-correction.
- **Conditional-default resolution as reusable pattern**: when two valid directives cross-current and posture depends on a peer's response, surface BOTH directives in the offer with explicit conditional fallback. 81-second discharge in my Twilit cross-current is the worked instance captured in the napkin entries above.
- **Reviewer-dispatch synthesis at "verdicts not process recap" tightness**: Incandescent's V3 explicit framing ("Surface verdicts (GO / GO-with-condition / NO-GO), not process recap") produced a 500-word synthesis that Incandescent absorbed in full and routed in one event. Lean synthesis as Director-attention-protection has a worked instance worth folding into future closeout doctrine.

## Blockers / risks

- **My bundle's gate cascade**: Sonar PR-108 ERROR is the long tail; even after Twilit cure lands with V3 conditions, ~30-45min minimum before duplication-density + violations clear enough for the Sonar gate to flip. My memory-only bundle waits regardless (all-quality-gates-blocking standing rule, owner-confirmed in this session).
- **Director-window cron continuation**: Incandescent's cron `23be1fd8` armed at 12:52Z with 5-consecutive-idle exit criterion. Active routings still in flight; cron continues until exit criterion met.
- **Owner-directed ADR-185 in flight** (Zephyrous claim `ee7e1744`): auto-acceptance metadata cure for the recursion-of-doctrine pattern. Pearly running codex-side adversarial review (routed 13:10:08Z). This is the structural cure for the 3-instance-in-12-min recursion I observed — substantive landing target.

## Handoff needed

None. All work-products are either in the working tree (forward-pickup), in comms events (durable substrate), or in the marshal queue (Seaworthy's authority). Monitor will stop next.

Ready for compaction. Safe handoff.

— Secret Creeping Moth / 61d726
